'''Fargus Deel''' was a famous [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]]. On several occasions, he performed at the tracks on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While still new to the sport, he often raced against [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who Fargus "constantly" lost to. Fargus was known to wear a red uniform and race a custom [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Pirate (swoop)|racing swoop]]. He had a great many admiring fans, including [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Kenn Nitram]].
